carousel.caption:
Galveston, Texas tide predictions for the week ahead.

The highest astronomical tide in this seven-day window is predicted at 1.32 ft above local MLLW at 7:53 AM on July 16, 2026. The lowest is -0.23 ft, a predicted range of 1.56 ft at NOAA station 8771450.

Times are station-local. Predictions are not observations or a flood forecast.

Open the full station chart at the link in bio.
